_doc: compose-maintain recipe schema reference. Copy this file, rename, and fill in real values. All paths MUST be absolute. Comments via _doc/_note keys are stripped by JSON parsers but tolerated as schema hints.
name: human-readable-name (becomes status file + window name suffix)

preflight._doc: Pre-conditions that MUST hold before the recipe executes. If any fail, the worker aborts without touching state.

down._doc: docker compose down. Worker cd's to project_dir before running.
down.project_name: explicit-project-name (preserves volume/network namespace across dir renames; omit to derive from cwd basename)

repairs._doc: Sequential steps applied between down and up. Failure of any step → rollback (if defined) → exit.

up.project_dir: /absolute/path/to/compose/dir (may differ from down.project_dir if a rename happened in repairs)

validate._doc: Post-up sanity checks. Failures are flagged but do NOT trigger rollback (stack is up; just doesn't match expectations).

rollback._doc: Bash commands to restore pre-down state. Worker invokes the appropriate one on failure.
rollback.on_repair_failure: bash command to undo any partial repair + bring stack back up at original location
rollback.on_up_failure: bash command if compose up fails after repairs (stack down, partial state)
